P1.name: Keyword Input / Seed
P1.description: Seed ingestion, initial keyword normalization and deduping

P2.name: Keyword Expansion
P2.description: Generate long-tail variations and related terms

P3.name: Search Volume / Scoring
P3.description: Score keywords for business relevance and volume estimates

P4.name: Off-topic / Global Kill Filters
P4.description: Apply global blocklists and project-level reject overrides

P6.name: Entity Extraction & Context
P6.description: Extract named entities, products, places for brief generation

P7.name: Topic Detection / Clustering Prep
P7.description: Prepare topic vectors and detect topic groups (SBERT/HDBSCAN)

P8.name: Topic Refinement / Canonical
P8.description: Select canonical keyword forms and name clusters

P9.name: Cluster Formation
P9.description: Group related topics into thematic clusters (LLM → JSON)

P10.name: Pillar Identification
P10.description: Generate pillar page title for each cluster

P11.name: Supporting Keyword Assignment
P11.description: Assign cluster/pillar supporting keywords and internal link map

P12.name: Competitor / SERP Research
P12.description: Extract competitor headings and SERP signals to validate pillars

P13.name: Pillar Briefing
P13.description: Create high-level pillar brief and angles

P14.name: Article Selection & Planning
P14.description: Decide article candidates per cluster and publishing plan

P15.name: Content Brief (Article)
P15.description: Generate structured JSON brief for each article
outputs: detailed JSON brief: title, meta, H2s, FAQs, entities

P16.name: Article Generation / Writer
P16.description: Generate article body from brief using Claude/Gemini

P17.name: Quality Intelligence (EEAT/GEO/Scoring)
P17.description: Score article for E-E-A-T, geography, direct-answer suitability

P18.name: Publish / Queue / Ranking Feedback
P18.description: Queue articles for publishing and collect ranking feedback
outputs: publish job entries, ranking feedback jobs
